note: Displayed over slow fade-to-black after shuttle launch. One line at a time, long pause between each. Bittersweet tone.

lines.text: The shuttle clears the bay doors. No alarm follows.
You crack the drive. CHIMERA. All of it. Names. Methods. Subjects.
Moscow will have the files by morning. What they do with them is not your mission.
You look at your hands. They are still human. For now.
AGENT KOSCHEI — MISSION COMPLETE. CLASSIFICATION: SUCCESS. PERSONAL COST: ONGOING.
